content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: Feb. 11, 1983
No. T-83-033

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Telephone Advice
        Rubaloff, Refuse Franchise Board

A refuse board that makes recommendations on garbage variances is making quasi-judicial decisions because their recommendations are routinely followed without substantive review.
